mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Eli Abraham Bowman, until he reached 21 years of age 04.03.1896
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Eli Abraham Bowman, until he reached 21 years of age 04.03.1896 Daniel B. Bowman, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 412&413, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
